title: Limonium ochranthum
intro: Limonium ochranthum, also known as Coastal Statice, is a perennial plant belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. This plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of Limonium ochranthum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Coastal Statice include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat respiratory issues, as well as skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
taxonomy: Limonium ochranthum is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is a type of sea lavender, native to the Mediterranean region. The classification of Limonium ochranthum is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Plumbaginales, Family: Plumbaginaceae, Genus: Limonium, Species: L. ochranthum. This classification helps to identify and understand the relationships within the plant's family. Limonium ochranthum is also known by its synonym, Statice ochrantha.
uses: Limonium ochranthum has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. Its extracts have been studied for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. Additionally, it may have neuroprotective effects and be used to treat certain neurological disorders. Further research is needed to fully understand the medicinal uses of Limonium ochranthum.
benefits: Limonium ochranthum is a type of salt-tolerant succulent that has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region. Limonium ochranthum is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. It is also thought to have antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. parts: Limonium ochranthum is an ornamental plant native to the Mediterranean region, but specific information regarding its medicinal parts is not readily available.
